channel.title: VLAN on simeononsecurity
channel.description: Recent content in VLAN on simeononsecurity

item.title: CompTIA SecOT+ (SOT-001): OT Cybersecurity Architecture, Design, and Engineering
item.category: "CompTIA SecOT+ Course" , "OT Architecture" , "Network Segmentation" , "Industrial DMZ" , "Zones and Conduits" , "Device Hardening" , "Defense in Depth" , "Operational Technology" , "SOT-001" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master OT cybersecurity architecture, design, and engineering for the CompTIA SecOT+ SOT-001 exam. Learn design principles, physical access controls, device hardening, network segmentation, the industrial DMZ, zones and conduits, data diodes, and identity management.

item.title: ISC2 CISSP: Communication and Network Security
item.category: "ISC2 CISSP Course" , "Network Security" , "Secure Architecture" , "Segmentation" , "Wireless Security" , "ISC2 Certification" , "Information Security" , "Zero Trust" , "SDN" , "Cybersecurity"
item.description: Master Communication and Network Security for the ISC2 CISSP exam. Learn secure network architecture, segmentation, wireless and cellular networks, modern network concepts, and secure channels.

item.title: Network Plus Course: Bandwidth Management and QoS
item.category: "Technology" , "Networking" , "IT Certifications" , "Network Management" , "Bandwidth Management" , "QoS" , "Traffic Shaping" , "Ethernet Switching" , "Network Performance" , "Network Optimization"
item.description: Learn about bandwidth management, quality of service (QoS), and techniques for prioritizing network traffic in this comprehensive guide for CompTIA's Network+ Certification Exam.
